title: Understanding cancer at a genetic level with AI
summary: Dr. Daudi Jjingo's team at Makerere University used AlphaFold, AlphaGenome, and Antigravity to identify genetic targets for early-onset breast cancer vaccine development in Uganda. The AI tools enabled analysis of 15,000 potential binding sites on a highly expressed protein, narrowing to 15 viable laboratory candidates using minimal compute resources.
